results.title: YouTube
results.snippet: Explore and share videos, music, and more on YouTube, the leading platform for online video streaming and sharing.

results.title: YouTube - YouTube
results.snippet: Welcome to the official YouTube channel – a home for the biggest moments, the smallest obsessions, and everything in between. Whatever you're into, it's on @YouTube.

results.title: YouTube - Apps on Google Play
results.snippet: Get the official YouTube app on Android phones and tablets. See what the world is watching -- from the hottest music videos to what’s popular in gaming, fashion, beauty, news, learning and more....
